release.title: What's New - {version}

release.subtitle: Quick summary of what changed in this version.
release.body:
• GIF/logo fixed to play the full animation.
• Search item with autocomplete and a cleaner viewer.
• More robust updater with ZIP validation and launch fallback.
• Stockpile data still writes to %LOCALAPPDATA%/GG Coalition.

tutorial.inicio.title: Guide: Home
tutorial.inicio.content:
# 🏠 Home

### 🎯 Description
The **Home** screen is your central command dashboard. It gathers all crucial information about the game execution and main modules in a single unified view. Ideal for quickly checking status without losing focus on what matters.

### ⚙️ How to Use
1. **View Status:** The top panel clearly shows if *Foxhole* is open and for how long it has been running.
2. **Integrated Chat:** Talk live with other players using the bottom tabs. You can navigate between *Logistics*, *Faci*, or *Global* chats. The text field supports automatic emojis!
3. **Sidebar Menu:** Click the `☰` icon in the top left corner to instantly access all other automation and search tools.

### 💡 Important Tips
* Always check if your status tab points to **"Active User"** to ensure you are properly logged in via Steam.
* Use the quick shortcuts in the bottom cards to quickly open the Stockpile or Production Calculator.
tutorial.chat.title: Guide: Chat
tutorial.chat.content:
# Chat

### Description
Use the integrated chat to follow coalition rooms, see online players, send quick emojis or GIF links, and receive mention alerts while you work in other tools.

### How to Use
1. Connect with your local Steam profile.
2. Select a room from the room list.
3. Type a message, use quick emojis, or send a GIF URL.
4. Type `@` to mention online users from the suggestion bar.

### Tips
* Mention overlays and sounds can be changed in Settings or Notifications.
* GIF previews render directly in the message list when the URL points to an image.
tutorial.ferramentas.title: Guide: Auto Clicker
tutorial.ferramentas.content:
# Auto Clicker

### Overview
This page controls the main Foxhole automations. Use Capture Foxhole while the game is open to register the game window and the virtual point where clicks will be sent. The hold modes are designed to work in the background whenever possible without stealing focus.

### Modes
* Auto Clicker: uses the main hotkey, F3 by default, to click the selected mouse button every 0.2s.
* Hold Shift: when enabled, Shift is only sent with Auto Clicker while you physically hold Shift.
* W Hold: uses the pilot hotkey, F4 by default, to hold W. Holding S pauses W; releasing S resumes it. Esc or the same hotkey stops the mode.
* W double-tap: when enabled, two quick W taps start W Hold.
* Move-Click F2: holds left mouse at the captured point in the background. Press F2 again or Esc to release.
* Right Hold: F9 by default, holds right mouse while Foxhole is focused without locking the cursor position. Press F9 again or Esc to release.
* Right double-click: disabled by default; when enabled, two quick right clicks start Right Hold.
* Artillery: F7 by default, sends R and left click at a steady pace. Esc or right click stops it.
* Fixed double-click: uses the configured key for fast clicks and supports slots 1 to 4.

### Overlay
The overlay shows only the active mode, a short hint, and the items enabled in settings. You can show profile, target, notifications, and change color. The panel also appears while F2, W Hold, or Right Hold are active.

### Tips
* Capture Foxhole again if the game restarts or clicks go to the wrong spot.
* Avoid using the same key for two modes.
* If a mode feels stuck, press Esc to release active holds.
tutorial.configuracoes.title: Guide: Settings
tutorial.configuracoes.content:
# ⚙️ Settings

### 🎯 Description
Personalize your **GG Coalition** experience with fine adjustments to the application and on-screen notifications (Overlay). Make it look the way you prefer with custom colors.

### ⚙️ How to Use
* **Sound Effects:** Enable or disable the beep that plays when a timer ends or when someone mentions you in chat.
* **System (Windows):** Enable **Start with Windows** if you're a daily player and want the app ready as soon as you turn on the PC.
* **Close Action:** Define whether the app should be closed or minimized to the tray when you close the window.
* **Overlay Adjustments:** Under "Adjust notifications in-game", a test screen will open. **Drag the text bubble across Foxhole** to the position where it bothers you the least and then click *Save Positions*.

### 💡 Important Tips
* The Overlay is invisible to normal screen capture tools, so your stream will remain clean if set up properly!
tutorial.stockpile.title: Guide: Stockpile
tutorial.stockpile.content:
# 📦 Stockpile (Inventory)

### 🎯 Description
The **Stockpile** automatically synchronizes your in-game visual inventory with the global coalition API. This allows your allies to see exactly what supplies (BMats, RMats, vehicles) are stored and available.

### ⚙️ How to Use
1. **In-game:** Go to a seaport or storage depot, open your private Stockpile tab, and click the `Pin` icon to pin it to the game map.
2. **In the App:** The tool will instantly find the `_MapData.sav` file on your local disk.
3. Click **Start Upload**.
4. **Done!** The App will now silently watch the file and upload any changes directly to the API.

### 💡 Important Tips
* If synchronization stops, make sure the Stockpile on the Foxhole map is still `Pinned`.
* You can view a summary of what you just uploaded directly on the chart on the Stockpile home screen.
tutorial.notificacoes.title: Guide: Notifications
tutorial.notificacoes.content:
# 🔔 Notifications and Timers

### 🎯 Description
Have you ever lost access to a vehicle because you forgot to renew the Squadlock? This tool is your audible and visual reminder to prevent that from happening.

### ⚙️ How to Use
1. As soon as you lock the vehicle (*Squadlock*) in the game, click **Activate** in the App.
2. A strict **30-minute** timer will start silently.
3. When the countdown ends, you will hear a clear alarm.
4. If the **Overlay** is enabled in settings, two virtual buttons will float on your game screen: **Reset** (restarts for +30 min) and **Finish**.

### 💡 Important Tips
* Keep Foxhole in Windowed Fullscreen Mode to ensure Overlay notifications always appear on top without conflicts.
tutorial.item_search.title: Guide: Item Search
tutorial.item_search.content:
# 🔍 Global Item Search

### 🎯 Description
The search engine saves the life of those operating on the front lines who need specific supplies urgently, such as anti-tank grenades, radios, or BMat crates.

### ⚙️ How to Use
1. Click the central text box and start typing the original English name of the item (e.g., `12.7mm`).
2. The autocomplete system will filter the best matches. Select the correct item.
3. The list will expand showing a global count.
4. Expand the view to find out exactly **in which base** and **in which region** the items are stored.

### 💡 Important Tips
* Try searching by the general weapon term if you can't find it by the specific name.
* The information is based on who has the application and scans Stockpiles in the region. Accuracy depends on teamwork!
tutorial.identify_item.title: Guide: Identifier
tutorial.identify_item.content:
# Icon Detector

### Description
**Identify Item** uses direct OpenCV matching. You choose a reference image and the app searches for that same visual on the Foxhole screen without comparing it against the internal Content icon database.

### How to Use
1. Click **Turn detection on** to open the detector overlay. If a reference already exists, detection starts automatically.
2. In the overlay, use **Select image**, **Paste image**, or **Select stockpile item** while a stockpile is open.
3. When selecting from a stockpile, click one highlighted slot to replace the current reference.
4. Use **Clear reference** to remove the current item. Use **X** to close the overlay and stop detection.

### Tips
* Tighter crops produce cleaner matches.
* The sound alert plays when the item enters the screen, not while it remains detected.
tutorial.production_calculator.title: Guide: Calculator
tutorial.production_calculator.content:
# 🏭 Production Calculator

### 🎯 Description
A robust tool for logistics planners. Make exhausting mental calculations for *Basic Materials*, *Explosive Materials*, among others, easier when closing queues at the Factory or MPF (Mass Production Factory).

### ⚙️ How to Use
1. **Standard Factory or MPF:** Select at the top whether you want to order loose items or large crates with a discount.
2. Navigate through the right panels to choose between *Neutral*, *Warden*, or *Colonial* items.
3. Click once to add 1 order to the queue. (Hold **SHIFT** and click to fill the entire queue with that item at once!).
4. The left list will be updated.

### 💡 Important Tips
* In the MPF, the **Progressive Discount** rate is applied to the total costs automatically. The final summary at the footer will tell you exactly how many Mats you need to bring with your truck!
* **Right-click** an item already in the left queue to remove it if you made a mistake.
tutorial.time_task.title: Guide: TimeTask
tutorial.time_task.content:
# ⏱️ TimeTask (Macro Recording)

### 🎯 Description
**TimeTask** is a powerful recorder for precise movements. Unlike a common clicker that only repeats a single key, it memorizes mouse movements, sequential clicks, and exact delays between actions.

### ⚙️ How to Use
1. Give your macro a unique name and click **Record**.
2. A countdown will appear at the top of your game.
3. Start performing the actions (e.g., dragging components from the base to the truck, splitting stacks, crafting garrison items).
4. Go back and click **Stop and Save**.
5. In the *Saved Macros* window, you can choose the number of Repetitions (if you want to do the rotation 10 times in a row, for example).

### 💡 Important Tips
* You can increase or decrease the playback **Speed** in the bottom panel. Ideal if you felt you recorded the action too "slowly" and want the bot to do it faster!
* To force stop playback before finishing all repetitions, just press the **Esc** key.
startup.tips.title: Welcome!
startup.tips.content:
## 🚀 What's New & Tutorials

Welcome to the new version of **GG Coalition**!

The application now features an **Integrated Help** system on all screens:
* Click the **❓ (Help)** button located in the top right corner of any page.
* You will have instant access to exclusive tips, a complete step-by-step guide, and the ideal shortcuts for the tool you are currently using!

Keep an eye on the **Release Notes** right after this to see what changed in the latest version.
